companies.name: OpenAI
companies.description: Developer of GPT and o-series models. ChatGPT is the world's most-used AI product. Restructured from nonprofit to capped-profit in 2019; IPO filing confidentially submitted Jun 2026.

products.name: GPT-4o
products.description: Omni model — text, vision, audio natively

products.name: ChatGPT
products.description: 100M+ weekly active users

products.name: o3
products.description: Advanced chain-of-thought reasoning

products.name: Sora
products.description: Text-to-video model

products.name: DALL-E 3
products.description: Text-to-image, integrated in ChatGPT

model_history.name: ChatGPT (GPT-3.5)
model_history.purpose: Conversational assistant that sparked the AI consumer revolution
model_history.notes: First model to reach 100M users in 2 months

model_history.name: GPT-4
model_history.purpose: Advanced reasoning and vision; first GPT with image understanding
model_history.notes: Params undisclosed; widely estimated ~1.8T MoE

model_history.name: GPT-4 Turbo
model_history.purpose: Extended 128K context window; lower cost than GPT-4
model_history.notes: Introduced 128K context and updated knowledge

model_history.name: GPT-4o
model_history.purpose: Native omni-modal: text, audio, and vision in one model
model_history.notes: First model to process audio natively end-to-end

model_history.name: GPT-4o mini
model_history.purpose: Small, fast, cheap — replaced GPT-3.5 Turbo in most use cases

model_history.name: o1
model_history.purpose: Chain-of-thought reasoning model; top USAMO math performance
model_history.notes: First in the o-series; thinks before answering

model_history.name: o1 Pro
model_history.purpose: Higher-compute version of o1 for hardest problems

model_history.name: o3
model_history.purpose: Major reasoning leap; near-human on ARC-AGI benchmark
model_history.notes: Scored 87.5% on ARC-AGI; considered milestone toward AGI

model_history.name: GPT-4.5
model_history.purpose: Improved instruction following and reduced hallucinations

model_history.name: GPT-5
model_history.purpose: Flagship next-generation model with native agentic capabilities
model_history.notes: Released alongside ChatGPT agent mode expansion

acquisitions.name: Global Illumination
acquisitions.description: Creative tools team; talent and tech for consumer product design

acquisitions.name: Rockset
acquisitions.description: Real-time analytics database; strengthens enterprise data infrastructure

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.description: Safety-focused AI lab founded by former OpenAI researchers. Pioneered Constitutional AI. Claude Mythos deployed to critical infrastructure globally. IPO filed Jun 2026.

products.name: Claude Mythos
products.description: Most powerful Claude; in critical infrastructure 15+ countries

products.name: Claude Fable 5
products.description: Accessible model capable of generating playable video games

products.name: Claude.ai
products.description: Web and mobile chat interface

products.name: Claude API
products.description: Developer API with tool use, vision, extended context

model_history.name: Claude 1
model_history.purpose: Constitutional AI-aligned assistant; first Claude release
model_history.notes: Trained using Constitutional AI; focused on harmlessness

model_history.name: Claude 2
model_history.purpose: Major upgrade; 100K context window for long documents
model_history.notes: First model with 100K token context

model_history.name: Claude 3 Haiku
model_history.purpose: Fastest, smallest Claude 3; edge and high-volume use

model_history.name: Claude 3 Sonnet
model_history.purpose: Balanced performance-speed model in the Claude 3 family

model_history.name: Claude 3 Opus
model_history.purpose: Flagship Claude 3; outperformed GPT-4 on most benchmarks
model_history.notes: First Claude to beat GPT-4 on MMLU

model_history.name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
model_history.purpose: Best coding model at launch; new computer-use capability
model_history.notes: Introduced Computer Use (agentic GUI interaction)

model_history.name: Claude 3.5 Haiku
model_history.purpose: Affordable, fast model competitive with Claude 3 Opus

model_history.name: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
model_history.purpose: Extended thinking mode; hybrid instant + reasoning responses
model_history.notes: First Claude with controllable chain-of-thought depth

model_history.name: Claude 4 Sonnet
model_history.purpose: Significant intelligence jump; best-in-class coding
model_history.notes: Claude 4 family launch alongside Opus 4

model_history.name: Claude 4 Opus
model_history.purpose: Most intelligent Claude 4; excels at complex multi-step tasks

model_history.name: Claude Mythos
model_history.purpose: Frontier model deployed to government and critical infrastructure
model_history.notes: Subject to US government access restrictions Jun 2026

model_history.name: Claude Fable 5
model_history.purpose: Accessible model; can generate fully playable video games
model_history.notes: Based on Mythos architecture, tuned for creative generation

companies.name: xAI
companies.description: AI startup founded by Elon Musk. Grok integrated into X (Twitter). Operates Colossus supercomputer cluster. Under DOJ scrutiny for unpermitted Memphis data center turbines.

products.name: Grok 3

products.name: Aurora
products.description: Text-to-image model integrated in X

products.name: Grok (X integration)

companies.name: Meta AI
companies.description: Meta's AI division. Llama open-source models are the most widely deployed in the world. AI integrated across Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp. Building superintelligence lab (with Alexandr Wang from Scale AI).

model_history.name: LLaMA 1
model_history.purpose: Open-source research model that ignited the open-weights movement
model_history.notes: Released with research paper; weights leaked publicly weeks later

model_history.name: LLaMA 2
model_history.purpose: First commercially licensed open LLM from Meta; major ecosystem adoption
model_history.notes: Partnered with Microsoft for enterprise licensing

model_history.purpose: Specialized code generation and explanation model
model_history.notes: Fine-tuned from Llama 2 on code datasets

model_history.name: LLaMA 3 (8B/70B)
model_history.purpose: Significant quality jump over Llama 2; strong multilingual

model_history.name: LLaMA 3.1 405B
model_history.purpose: First open model competitive with GPT-4 Turbo on most benchmarks
model_history.notes: Landmark: open-source matches closed frontier for first time

model_history.name: LLaMA 3.2
model_history.purpose: Multimodal vision models (11B/90B) plus edge models (1B/3B)
model_history.notes: First Llama with vision capability

model_history.name: LLaMA 3.3 70B
model_history.purpose: Efficient update; 405B-level performance at 70B params

model_history.name: LLaMA 4 Scout
model_history.purpose: 17B active (MoE); extremely long 10M token context window
model_history.notes: 10M context is longest ever; MoE with 16 experts

model_history.name: LLaMA 4 Maverick
model_history.purpose: 128 experts MoE; GPT-4o competitive at fraction of cost
model_history.notes: Beats GPT-4o and Gemini 2.0 Flash on benchmarks

acquisitions.name: Scale AI (significant investment)
acquisitions.description: Strategic investment alongside hiring Alexandr Wang for Meta superintelligence lab

companies.name: Mistral AI
companies.description: European open-weight model lab. Pioneer of efficient MoE architecture. Rumored €3B raise at €20B valuation (Jun 2026). Secured $830M debt for Paris data center. First acquisition: Koyeb.

products.description: Fastest public LLM API — Llama, Mistral, Gemma at 800-1500 tok/sec
